examples: Thereare 13 books of this 'Unfortunate Events' series written by DanielHandler under the pseudonym of Lemony Snicket.
The songs were written for the audiobook version of the Lemony Snicket children's book series.
The Tragic Treasury is a collection of songs included on the audiobook versions of the Lemony Snicket books.
Fans of a Series of Unfortunate Events, the children's book series by Merritt's buddy, Lemony Snicket, might already know the song.
